positive: An abstract, celestial-themed illustration perfect for wall art. Depict a stylized crescent moon nestled within a constellation of abstract geometric shapes (triangles, circles, arcs). The color palette should be deep indigo, dusty rose, gold foil accents, and midnight blue. The style should be elegant, clean line art combined with watercolor washes, giving it a sophisticated, modern boho feel. Incorporate subtle elements of zodiac signs or starry dust. The composition should be vertically oriented and highly decorative, suitable for framing. Golden ratio composition, ethereal, cosmic, mystical, 8k, high resolution, trending on Etsy, celestial art.
